name: procurement coordinators in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor onboarding documents/month tool
description: For procurement coordinators in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor onboarding documents/month, inefficient document collection causes delays in onboarding new vendors. We streamline the process instead of manual email requests and follow-ups.
target_audience: procurement coordinators in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor onboarding documents/month
problem_solved: Inefficient collection of vendor onboarding documents
